news.title: Apes, welcome a-bored. Early access to OpenSea Mobile is now live for anyone holding a or a Mutant Ape. - Tap the link (in tweet below) - Verify your ape - Download the app See you there! unified agent tool auth + added usage reporting to tool-sdk  This enables one round trip with a single EIP-3009 signature. Identity, payment, and usage metering all from one X-Payment header. Free and paid tools ...
The new mobile app is smooth and addictive. It’s clearly designed to make onboarding people outside our space much easier. Well done Got my Hexagon PFP on mobile! Lazy Lions always!!! Zack Brenner

Got early access to the Mobile beta thanks to DannFox The Day OpenSea Stopped Being a Desktop Since October 2025, my OpenSea routine has had a chair attached to it. Desktop open, tabs everywhere, bookmarked wallets I'd check one by one like a ritual. Traveling meant being blind and missing...

2021: We are all going to make it 2024: No crying in the casino 2026: Crime is legal ! Below are the facts & my conclusion  RT to spread awareness Read on ... Two 20 year old NFT rugpullers getting charged with wire fraud and money laundering, which both carry a maximum sentence of 20 years in prison So reporting to CI actually does work. Maybe we should send some more names their way. WAGMI Ledge...

Thank you Mr. President, and thank you to everyone who helped make this happen. This experience has been life changing, and I am looking forwa...
